subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Ever hast thou been the recipient of the glances from the Eye of Divine Providence, and the object of gracious favors [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان همواره مشمول لحظات عین عنایت حق بوده و منظور نظر الطاف
subcodes.subjects: @soul; spirit after death, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
